goal: Emails, Files, and Prep pages get complete UI state coverage (loading skeleton, error with retry, empty state with CTA) and pass a mobile layout check at 375px
why: Operators run the back office from a phone or a slow connection; a blank screen on slow load or a 5xx is the most common 'tool is broken' report. Closes REQ-17, REQ-18, and the last open M3 exit criterion.
success_criteria: On a throttled (Slow 3G) connection, each of the three pages shows a skeleton/placeholder immediately on load before data arrives
When the backing API returns a 5xx, the affected section shows an inline 'Could not load — Retry' message — no blank section, no unhandled JS error
At 375px viewport width, no page content overflows horizontally on any of the three pages
All interactive elements on the three pages have a tap target >= 44x44px at 375px
Each page has a non-empty empty state with its CTA: Emails 'Ask the agent to list your emails', Files 'Search for a file in the chat', Prep 'Add a recipient to get started'

tasks.title: Fix touch-target floors and add empty-CTA helper in globals.css
acceptance_criteria: Mobile .item .btn.danger:not(.sm) override no longer drops below 44px
Reusable .empty .empty-hint helper exists for empty-state CTA secondary copy
No #000/#fff; new color via existing OKLCH tokens only
tasks.action: Edit .btn.sm (globals.css:324-330) min-height 28px -> 44px. Edit mobile override (globals.css:1162-1172) .item .btn.danger:not(.sm) min-height 32px -> 44px. Add .empty .empty-hint rule under .empty (globals.css:467-473) using --font-mono, --text-muted, --sp-2. Do not touch .skeleton/.skeleton-row/sonar-sweep.

tasks.title: Emails page: skeleton, inline error+retry, empty CTAs, 375px fixes
acceptance_criteria: Accounts region shows .skeleton-row sonar-sweep skeleton while loading, not bare text
5xx on /api/mail/accounts or /api/mail/scheduled shows inline 'Could not load — Retry' with a working Retry button
Scheduled empty state reads 'Ask the agent to list your emails'
At 375px no horizontal overflow and every button tap area >= 44x44px
tasks.action: Replace loading text branch (emails/page.tsx:253-254) with 6 .skeleton-row blocks mirroring files/page.tsx:206-214. Add Retry button to accounts error (re-run fetchAccounts, reset loading) and scheduled error (re-run fetchScheduled, reset scheduledLoading). Change scheduled empty copy (emails/page.tsx:536) to 'Ask the agent to list your emails'. Remove inline minHeight:36px from buttons (emails/page.tsx:301,310,317,326,350); use btn/btn ghost/btn danger + sm.

verification.pattern: Ask the agent to list your emails

tasks.title: Files page: add error retry + align empty copy, confirm 375px

Folder empty state includes CTA copy 'Search for a file in the chat'
At 375px no horizontal overflow and Delete button tap area >= 44x44px
Existing skeleton on initial load and folder navigation still renders
tasks.action: Add Retry button to error notice (files/page.tsx:194-198): re-run loadFolder(activeConn,currentFolderId) or loadConnections+loadFolder if no active conn. Update folder empty state (files/page.tsx:288-291) to append Search for a file in the chat.. Do not change skeleton blocks (files/page.tsx:206-214,280-287). Delete button governed by T1 mobile floor.

tasks.title: Prep page: crew skeleton, error retry, empty CTA, 375px fixes

5xx on /api/recipients shows inline 'Could not load — Retry' with a working Retry button re-running loadCrew
Crew empty state reads 'Add a recipient to get started'
At 375px prep-grid stacks one column with no horizontal overflow and the X remove button tap area >= 44x44px

In crew panel render (prep/page.tsx:199-229) branch on crewLoading first -> render .crew-list of 4 .skeleton-row blocks. Add Retry button to crewError notice (prep/page.tsx:198) calling loadCrew.
